underlying_goal: Prepare incremental Pest tests for a Laravel application by first creating functional specifications for each public route validated by the user, then generating corresponding test files
friction_detail: Assistant repeated routes already validated and failed to save validated descriptions to README, requiring user to correct the flow.
brief_summary: User wanted functional specifications for all public routes followed by Pest tests mimicking controller paths; assistant validated all routes but repeated some and delayed saving, then generated tests successfully.
user_instructions_to_assistant: No me indiques la ruta, solo haz la descripción para que la valide
Almacena las descripciones en el README
El archivo de test imite la ruta del archivo (tests/Feature/Http/Controllers/ProductController para app/Http/Controllers/ProductController.php)
